creator: ls@berkeley.gambit.com.ru
text:
graphics/GIFgraph use image creation methods from graphics/p5-GD package.

Current p5-GD version don't support GIF generation, only PNG.

I am the port MAINTAINER and I suggest to apply the following patch to the
GIFgraph port to use PNG methods from p5-GD.

Fix: Download new GIFgraph port skeleton from

		http://ls.si.ru/FreeBSD/GIFgraph.tar.gz
	
	Or apply the following patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
	# update ports

	# remove old p5-GD package to force installation of new p5-GD

	cd ports/graphics/GIFgraph && make install clean

	# try to run any code that use GIFgraph
	# -- it will fail due to removed GIF support
